item.title: Kate Spade Outlet has a $329 cargo backpack on sale for only $78
item.description: The "compact yet spacious" bag comes in three colors.

item.title: Walmart has a bestselling retro indoor and outdoor area rug for just $23 that 'cleans up easily'
item.description: "It survives after snow and rain with vibrant colors and no breakdown."

item.title: Amazon is selling a touchscreen Windows 11 laptop for only $580 for a limited time
item.description: "Four years later and still loving it," one shopper said.

item.title: REI is selling a 'very comfortable' hooded shirt jacket for $60 that has four pockets
item.description: "This is the perfect hoodie for chilly weather."

item.title: Amazon's sale on Calvin Klein handbags can save you up to 71% off select styles
item.description: These stylish accessories are all more than half off.
